blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,322 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
